save.title: Save Management
save.emptySlots: No save slot metadata; complete character creation or import from the management page to see the list.
save.autoSave.timepoint.label: Timepoint Save
save.autoSave.timepoint.hint: When enabled, your game progress is automatically saved at set intervals to a dedicated 'Timepoint Save' slot, preventing accidental progress loss. Only runs while the save panel is open.
save.backup.hint: Package all characters, saves, settings, and prompt overrides into a single file for migrating to another device or restoring data.
save.backup.includeRefHint: When checked, the backup file will include character reference images (portraits, avatars, etc.), significantly increasing file size. Uncheck to back up text data only.
save.backup.parseError: File parsing failed, please verify the file format
save.github.hint: Sync your full save data to your GitHub private repository. Requires a Personal Access Token (Fine-grained, Contents Read & Write).
save.github.hintBefore: Sync your full save data to your GitHub private repository. Requires a
save.github.downloadConfirmText: This action will overwrite all local data (saves, settings, images). This cannot be undone.
save.lan.hint: Devices on the same WiFi can transfer saves via this relay. Data only exists in the dev server's memory and is cleared when the terminal closes.
save.presets.hint: Export/import user-customized worlds, origins, traits, talents, etc. as standalone files. Small and easy to share between players. Does not include saves, vectors, or API configuration.
save.presets.exportEmpty: No custom presets available for export
save.presets.notEnabled: Custom presets feature is not enabled
save.presets.importFormatError: Wrong file format — expected a custom presets pack (type=custom_presets)
save.presets.importVersionError: Preset pack version {version} is higher than the current supported v{supported}, please upgrade the app before importing
save.presets.importPackMismatch: This preset pack is from pack "{source}", but the current active pack is "{target}". Importing may cause display issues due to field mismatches. Continue?
save.presets.noPack: Unable to determine target game pack
save.import.warningFull: This operation will clear all local data and replace it with the backup
save.import.warningFullList1: All existing characters, saves, and vectors will be deleted
save.import.warningFullList2: All API configurations, UI settings, and Prompt overrides will be replaced
save.import.warningFullList3: Recommended: click 'Export Backup' first to save current data
save.import.warningFullList4: If the backup contains an active game pointer, it will auto-resume after refresh
save.import.acknowledge: I understand this operation will replace all local data
save.import.warningProfile: This operation only adds or overwrites the characters listed above
save.import.warningProfileHint: Other characters, API configurations, and global settings are not affected.
save.import.acknowledgeRequired: Please check the confirmation box first — this operation will replace all local data
save.import.card.rail.label: Import progress
save.import.card.upload.title: Choose a game card
save.import.card.upload.note: A game card is a packaged world setup. Importing creates a brand-new save and never overwrites your existing progress.
save.import.card.upload.wrongExt: Please choose a .aga-card game card file.
save.import.card.upload.tooLarge: This card is too large and may be corrupted — it can't be opened.
save.import.card.upload.notGzip: This file can't be opened — it may not be a game card.
save.import.card.upload.readFailed: Failed to read the file, please try again.
save.import.card.decode.title: Opening the game card…
save.import.card.preview.title: What's in this card
save.import.card.preview.author: Author: {author}
save.import.card.preview.driftNewer: This card is from a newer version ({card} ＞ your {installed}). It can be imported; a few new things may not show.
save.import.card.preview.alreadyImported: You've imported this card before — importing again creates another save.
save.import.card.flag.worldBooksHint: Lore entries the author wrote, imported with this new save.
save.import.card.flag.promptSettingsHint: Writing preferences like person, length and style.
save.import.card.flag.plotDirectionHint: The story arc the author designed.
save.import.card.flag.engineConfigHint: The author's engine-config overrides for the current pack.
save.import.card.flag.builtinOverridesHi: The author's edits to the system prompts.
save.import.card.flag.settingsHint: The author's engine settings (no keys included).
save.import.card.flag.apiTemplateHint: API config templates bundled in the card — imported disabled; you fill your own key.
save.import.card.flag.imagesHint: Images bundled in the card, imported with this new save.
save.import.card.nsfw.title: This card contains adult content
save.import.card.nsfw.line1: This game card contains adult content. You need to turn on adult mode to import it.
save.import.card.nsfw.line2: Nothing in the card is altered during import.
save.import.card.nsfw.line3: Turning on adult mode adjusts your global settings.
save.import.card.protagonist.fixedNoName: This card's hero has no name; some references may show blank after import.
save.import.card.protagonist.fixedNote: The author has set up this character — just import and play.
save.import.card.protagonist.templateTit: The author made the hero an editable template
save.import.card.protagonist.grayWarn: These recompute automatically from your edits above and can't be edited directly:
save.import.card.protagonist.blankTitle: This card needs you to create the character
save.import.card.protagonist.blankLine1: These "blank" cards aren't supported for import yet — coming in a later version.
save.import.card.protagonist.blankLine2: Your existing saves and data are completely unchanged.
save.import.card.global.title: Bundled data
save.import.card.global.none: This card has no extra bundled data.
save.import.card.global.autoLegend: Imported automatically with the save (only affects this new save)
save.import.card.global.optInLegend: Affects everything — tick to import (off by default)
save.import.card.global.apiInfo: Imported as "disabled"; you fill your own key (the card contains no keys).
save.import.card.global.configOverlaysHi: Overwrites your current pack's matching config.
save.import.card.global.builtinPromptOve: Replaces built-in prompts, affecting all games.
save.import.card.global.authorGameplaySe: Override your global action-options / chain-of-thought / world-heartbeat / prose-polish settings with the author's.
save.import.card.progress.title: Importing "{title}"…
save.import.card.progress.wait: This step can't be cancelled, please wait.
save.import.card.progress.skipOpening: Skip opening generation (the first round will fill it)
save.import.card.success.title: Import complete
save.import.card.success.line: "{title}" is now a new save. Your existing progress is unchanged.
save.import.card.success.degraded: Retrieval is temporarily unavailable (no embedding model configured). You can rebuild the index in the save once configured.
save.import.card.success.openingDegraded: The opening narrative couldn't be generated (the AI call failed — usually no usable language model configured). The save was created; configure AI, then advance the first round to fill in the narrative.
save.import.card.success.globalChanged: This import changed your global settings per your selections.
save.import.card.success.undoneGlobal: Global changes undone — your global settings are back to before the import (the new save is kept).
save.import.card.error.title: Can't import
save.import.card.error.decode-failed: This file can't be opened — it may not be a game card.
save.import.card.error.bad-format: This isn't a valid game card (format mismatch).
save.import.card.error.checksum-mismatch: The game card may be corrupted or altered and can't be imported.
save.import.card.error.invalid-shape: The game card's contents are incomplete and can't be imported.
save.import.card.error.no-pack: No game content pack is loaded, so the card can't be imported.
save.import.card.error.pack-mismatch: This card doesn't match your current game content pack and can't be imported.
save.import.card.error.blank-unsupported: These blank cards aren't supported for import yet.
save.import.card.error.write-failed: The import didn't finish and has been rolled back to its previous state. Your existing data is unaffected.
save.vectors.rebuildEmpty: No Engram events, no rebuild needed
save.overwrite.title: Confirm Overwrite
save.overwrite.text: This save already has data. Are you sure you want to overwrite? This cannot be undone.
save.newSlotModal.title: Create New Save Slot
save.backup.fullBackup.secretWarning: Full backup contains all your data, including API keys, GitHub sync tokens, and custom server URLs. This is a private file for restoring your own setup across devices—keep it safe and never share or upload it publicly. To share with others, use 'Export as Game Card', which strips all secrets automatically.
save.export.entryHint: Package the current world into a shareable game card — all secrets are removed automatically.
save.export.gate.pass: Memory graph is complete — ready to export
save.export.gate.passDetail: {npc} NPC(s) and {loc} location(s) are all in the graph
save.export.gate.fail: Memory graph is incomplete — solidify it before exporting
save.export.gate.emptyTitle: This world has no NPCs or locations yet
save.export.gate.emptyDetail: There is no world content to export — build the world first, then export.
save.export.protagonist.fixed.label: Fixed protagonist
save.export.protagonist.fixed.desc: The player receives your protagonist as-is and cannot change it.
save.export.protagonist.template.label: Template protagonist
save.export.protagonist.template.desc: You provide defaults; the player may edit the fields you tick.
save.export.protagonist.blank.label: Blank protagonist
save.export.protagonist.blank.desc: The player creates their own character; the card only provides the world.
save.export.protagonist.field.name: Name
save.export.protagonist.fixedEmptyName: A fixed protagonist must have a name, or imported NPC dialogue will show blanks.
save.export.protagonist.blankSetupWarn: Blank-mode opening setup should stay generic — don't hardcode protagonist details.
save.export.meta.descPlaceholder: Describe this card in one line…
save.export.meta.openingHintPlaceholder: One line to steer the style, viewpoint, or tone of the AI-generated opening on import…
save.export.meta.openingHintHelp: When a player imports this card, the AI uses this to shape the opening narrative.
save.export.meta.coverTooLarge: Cover image too large (over 2MB) — please choose another.
save.export.meta.coverInvalidType: Cover must be an image file (PNG/JPG/WebP, etc.).
save.export.content.core: World · Locations · NPCs & relations · Character · Inventory · Memory graph
save.export.checklist.worldBook.label: World books
save.export.checklist.builtinOverride.hi: Your edits to this pack's system prompts (current pack only).
save.export.checklist.engineConfig.label: Engine config & prompt overrides
save.export.checklist.engineConfig.hint: Your engine setting overlays and prompt overrides.
save.export.checklist.promptSettings.hin: Writing preferences: perspective, word count, story style.
save.export.checklist.heroinePlan.label: Plot plan · heroine arc
save.export.checklist.heroinePlan.hint: Heroine stages / interactions / scene plans (contains spoilers).
save.export.checklist.plotDirection.hint: Your authored plot nodes; progress is reset on export so players start fresh.
save.export.checklist.settings.label: Settings (no secrets)
save.export.checklist.settings.hint: UI / gameplay / AI parameters to help newcomers start fast; no keys.
save.export.checklist.apiTemplate.label: API template (no secrets)
save.export.checklist.apiTemplate.hint: Which provider / model / params + assignments; the player just fills in their own key.
save.export.images.nsfw: Include adult content (private profiles / body details / secret images)
save.export.preview.keepWorld: {npc} NPCs · {loc} locations · {img} images · worldview · inventory · plot direction setup
save.export.preview.keepEngramCurated: {n} relationship memories (confirmed by you, stamped as core settings)
save.export.preview.stripItems: Narrative & turn history · short/mid/long-term memory · status effects · NPC private chats · action options · heartbeat history · image task queue
save.export.preview.resetPlot: Plot direction progress back to start
save.export.preview.nsfwDropHint: Adult content unchecked: relationship entries and fields containing private content are dropped automatically on export
save.export.preview.missingImages: {n} referenced images are no longer in the local cache — the exported card will lack them
save.export.neverExport.title: 🔒 Never exported (peace of mind)
save.export.neverExport.items: API keys · GitHub tokens · custom server URLs
save.toCard.loadFailed: Failed to read the save — cannot convert
save.toCard.packIdMissing: This save lacks game pack info — cannot convert
save.toCard.gateWarnTitle: Memory graph is incomplete (you can still make the card)
save.toCard.gateWarnEmptyTitle: This save has no NPCs or locations (you can still make the card)
save.toCard.gateWarnHint: After import the AI may not recall these details; for better retrieval quality, load this save in-game and solidify it first, then convert.
save.toCard.classify.hint: AI sorts each relation into "worldview setting" or "plot event" — you confirm one by one; kept entries enter the card as core settings
save.toCard.classify.failed: AI sorting failed — retry, or just tick manually
save.toCard.classify.noAi: No AI configured — can't auto-sort; you can still tick the relations to keep manually
save.toCard.classify.emptyEdges: This save has no relationship memories — continue directly
